name: ppl-app
description: Pitching Performance Lab — Scheduling, Payments & Management Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:setup: cd packages/backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:reset: cd packages/backend && npx prisma db push --force-reset && npm run db:seed
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/backend && npm run typecheck && cd ../frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.setup: npm install && cd packages/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run db:up && sleep 3 && npm run db:setup
